## Summary

Describe the problem and the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or provider connector
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Breaking change

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run ci` passes
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] README, OpenAPI, API docs, and `.env.example` were updated where applicable
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, personal data, production URLs, database files, or logs are included
- [ ] Security and privacy impact was reviewed

## Test evidence

List commands and relevant sanitized results.

## API or migration impact

Describe contract changes, environment variables, compatibility, and migration steps. Write "None" if not applicable.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for user-interface changes when helpful.
